nodes.label: Burden Absorption Principle
nodes.rationale: A maintenance system fails at adoption the moment it asks a human to enter data. System must absorb burden, never add it.

nodes.label: XSS Vulnerability Fix
nodes.rationale: HTML-escape all parameters with regex replacement to prevent XSS.

nodes.label: WebSocket Queue Overflow Fix
nodes.rationale: Capped max queue size at 1000 with automatic eviction to avoid OOM.

nodes.label: SSRF Webhook Validation
nodes.rationale: Added URL validation blocking private IP ranges to prevent SSRF.
